source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d: 2026-07-15..07-21, landingPage + sessionManualAdContent split) + Shopify live pull (net_sales EUR + orders, last 90d, by billing_country). Significance/verdict block carried from last Monday (2026-07-13); recomputed Mondays only.
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed daily by Polly (data); pause/promote verdicts on Mondays. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.
polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Wednesday 2026-07-22). No pause/promote verdicts today - decision review: Mondays. EN A/B: control A edges ahead this week - by page A 0.85% (14 txn / 1647 sess) vs B 0.68% (12 txn / 1755 sess); by ad-content lp_a 0.89% (15 txn / 1690 sess) vs lp_b 0.73% (13 txn / 1782 sess). Small gap, well under the significance threshold - no verdict today. BIG STATUS CHANGE: the localized-LP tracking collapse is FIXED. Bengt repointed the CF Worker rotator (nordicpirates-ab) on 07-21 so play-it/play-de/play-es/play-fr now land on the live lying-pirates-<lang> pages (they were 404ing to retired big-box-*-<lang> URLs = the GA collapse 600->29/wk). Early recovery already visible in the 7d tail: lying-pirates-it 36 sess (bounce 80.6%, fresh redirect traffic, small n), lying-pirates-de 15 sess; old big-box-*-<lang> now residual tails only (it 13, de 6). ViewContent added to it/de LPs; ES/FR still paused so no ViewContent there yet. Clean full recovery reads next week once a 7d window sits entirely post-fix. Shopify 90d stable & growing: US/UK/IT top 3 unchanged (IT 148 orders / EUR10,625, 3rd-largest market).

experiments.name: Big Box LP - Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).

significance.window: 2026-06-01..07-12 (cumulative) - carried from last Monday verdict, recomputed Mondays

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Wed). By page this week A 0.85% (14 txn / 1647 sess) vs B 0.68% (12 txn / 1755 sess); by ad-content lp_a 0.89% (15 txn / 1690 sess) vs lp_b 0.73% (13 txn / 1782 sess). Control A edges ahead this week but the gap is small and cumulative conv is still short of the ~100-per-variant threshold - no verdict today, significance recomputed Mondays. Standing recommendation holds: ship shared improvements to A & B and launch V3 as a genuinely different challenger.

experiments.name: Localized LP variants (IT / DE / FR / ES)
experiments.hypothesis: Translated LPs convert non-EN paid traffic at rates comparable to EN, once ad clicks actually land on a live localized page.

retired_urls_residual_7d.note: Old rotator A/B targets, retired 07-21 when the worker was repointed. Small tails are residual/cached traffic, expected to decay to zero.

real_sales_90d.note: Refreshed 2026-07-22 via live Shopify pull (orders by billing_country, revenue = net_sales EUR, last 90d). Confirms localized markets keep buying in real volume even while GA LP-level conv still reads ~0 this week (only a partial post-fix window + lossy LP->checkout attribution).

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Wed), no verdict. STATUS FLIP from last week's 'tracking-issue': FIXED. Bengt verified vs Meta (act 314601282522803) that IT & DE were ACTIVE with full delivery all along; the real fault was the rotator sending play-it/play-de clicks to retired big-box-*-<lang> URLs that 404'd. Repointed 07-21 -> now landing on live lying-pirates-<lang> with PageView + (it/de) ViewContent. Early recovery: it 36 sess, de 15 sess in the partial post-fix tail; old URLs decaying. Real demand always intact: IT 3rd-largest market (148 orders / EUR10,625 in 90d). MONITOR through next week for a clean full-week recovery read; conv verdict waits for a real post-fix window + Monday cadence.
